rulings.Case Title: MOLALLA HOLDINGS, INC., DBA vs. LEE, DEBRA L AKA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of P/A And Declaration In Support Of Motion To S/A Judgment; Proposed Order; For Judgment Judgment
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 6, 2006, LINE 1, DEFENDANT DEBRA L. LEE, AKA DEBRA LYNNE LEE'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment IS OFF CALENDAR, COURT HAS PREVIOUSLY ASKED FOR COURTESY COPIES FROM MOVING PARTY AND MOVANT HAS FAILED TO PROVIDE THEM. IN ADDITION, ON 11/27/06, PLAINTIFF FILED A NOTICE OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. =(302/PHA/ju)
